glosses.zh-Hans: 女作案者; 女加害者
glosses.yue: 女施害者; 女作案者
glosses.vi: thủ phạm nữ; người phạm tội (nữ)
glosses.ja: 女性の加害者; 女性の犯人

sentences.target: Ich habe die Täterin gestern im Park gesehen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhaːbə diː ˈtɛːtəʁɪn ˈɡɛstɐn ɪm paʁk ɡəˈzeːən/

translations.de: Ich habe die Täterin gestern im Park gesehen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhaːbə diː ˈtɛːtəʁɪn ˈɡɛstɐn ɪm paʁk ɡəˈzeːən/
translations.en: I saw the perpetrator yesterday in the park.
translations.es: Vi a la delincuente ayer en el parque.
translations.fr: J'ai vu la délinquante hier au parc.
translations.it: Ho visto la responsabile ieri al parco.
translations.zh-Hans: 我昨天在公园看见了嫌疑人。
translations.yue: 我琴日喺公園見到個疑犯。
translations.ru: Я вчера в парке видел преступницу.
translations.pt: Eu vi a criminosa ontem no parque.
translations.vi: Hôm qua tôi thấy thủ phạm ở công viên.
translations.nl: Ik heb de dader gisteren in het park gezien.
translations.uk: Я вчора бачив злочинницю в парку.
translations.hu: Tegnap láttam az elkövetőt a parkban.
translations.hi: मैंने कल पार्क में अपराधी को देखा.
translations.el: Χτες είδα τη δράστιδα στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Jeg så gjerningskvinnen i parken i går.
translations.id: Kemarin aku melihat pelaku di taman.
translations.sv: Jag såg gärningskvinnan i parken i går.
translations.ro: Am văzut făptașa ieri în parc.
translations.cs: Včera jsem v parku viděl pachatelku.
translations.da: Jeg så gerningskvinden i parken i går.
translations.ja: 昨日、公園で犯人を見た。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary, 1st sg present indicative; forms the present perfect with the participle 'gesehen'.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of the direct object NP.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; head of the direct object NP.
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb phrase to indicate time.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces the PP 'im Park' (location).
Common noun, masculine dative singular as object of the preposition 'im'.
Past participle of the lexical verb; head of the compound predicate in the present perfect.

sentences.target: Die Täterin war wohl sehr nervös.

translations.de: Die Täterin war wohl sehr nervös.
translations.en: The perpetrator was probably very nervous.
translations.es: La delincuente probablemente estaba muy nerviosa.
translations.fr: La délinquante était sans doute très nerveuse.
translations.it: La responsabile probabilmente era molto nervosa.
translations.pt: A criminosa provavelmente estava muito nervosa.
translations.vi: Thủ phạm có lẽ rất căng thẳng.
translations.ar: كانت الجانية على الأرجح متوترة جدًا.
translations.nl: De dader was waarschijnlijk erg nerveus.
translations.hu: Az elkövető valószínűleg nagyon ideges volt.
translations.hi: अपराधी शायद बहुत घबराई हुई थी.
translations.el: Η δράστιδα μάλλον ήταν πολύ νευρική.
translations.ja: 犯人はたぶんとても緊張していた。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner of the subject NP.
Common noun, feminine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite copular auxiliary, 3rd sg preterite; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Modal adverb/particle expressing probability; modifies the copular clause.
Degree adverb; intensifies the predicate adjective 'nervös'.
Predicate adjective; complement of the copula 'war'.

sentences.target: Im Bericht beschreibt die Zeugin die Täterin.
sentences.reading: /ɪm bəˈʁɪçt bəˈʃʁaɪ̯pt diː ˈtsɔʏ̯ɡɪn diː ˈtɛːtəʁɪn/

translations.de: Im Bericht beschreibt die Zeugin die Täterin.
translations.ipa: /ɪm bəˈʁɪçt bəˈʃʁaɪ̯pt diː ˈtsɔʏ̯ɡɪn diː ˈtɛːtəʁɪn/
translations.en: In the report, the witness describes the perpetrator.
translations.es: En el informe, la testigo describe a la delincuente.
translations.fr: Dans le rapport, la témoin décrit la délinquante.
translations.it: Nel rapporto, la testimone descrive la responsabile.
translations.zh-Hans: 在报告中，目击者描述了嫌疑人。
translations.yue: 喺報告入面，目擊者形容咗個疑犯。
translations.pt: No relatório, a testemunha descreve a criminosa.
translations.vi: Trong báo cáo, nhân chứng mô tả thủ phạm.
translations.nl: In het rapport beschrijft de getuige de dader.
translations.hu: A jelentésben a tanú leírja az elkövetőt.
translations.hi: रिपोर्ट में गवाह अपराधी का वर्णन करती है.
translations.el: Στην έκθεση η μάρτυρας περιγράφει τη δράστιδα.
translations.ro: În raport, martora o descrie pe făptașă.
translations.ja: 報告書で目撃者が犯人の特徴を説明している。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces the fronted PP 'Im Bericht' (context/location).
Common noun, masculine dative singular; object of the preposition 'Im'.
Finite lexical verb, 3rd sg present indicative; main predicate of the clause.
Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner of the subject NP.
Common noun, feminine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of the direct object NP.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'beschreibt'.

sentences.target: Der Polizist sucht die Täterin noch immer.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ pɔliˈtsɪst zuːxt diː ˈtɛːtəʁɪn nɔx ˈɪmɐ/

translations.de: Der Polizist sucht die Täterin noch immer.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ pɔliˈtsɪst zuːxt diː ˈtɛːtəʁɪn nɔx ˈɪmɐ/
translations.en: The police officer is still looking for the perpetrator.
translations.es: El policía sigue buscando a la delincuente.
translations.fr: Le policier cherche encore la délinquante.
translations.it: Il poliziotto sta ancora cercando la responsabile.
translations.yue: 個警察仲喺度搵個疑犯。
translations.pt: O policial ainda está procurando a criminosa.
translations.vi: Cảnh sát vẫn đang tìm thủ phạm.
translations.ar: الشرطي ما זال يبحث عن الجانية.
translations.nl: De agent zoekt nog steeds naar de dader.
translations.hu: A rendőr még mindig keresi az elkövetőt.
translations.hi: पुलिसकर्मी अभी भी अपराधी की तलाश में है.
translations.el: Ο αστυνομικός ψάχνει ακόμα τη δράστιδα.
translations.ro: Polițistul încă o caută pe făptașă.
translations.ja: 警察官はまだ犯人を探している。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine nominative singular; determiner of the subject NP.
Common noun, masculine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb, 3rd sg present indicative; main predicate.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of the direct object NP.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'sucht'.
Adverb meaning 'still/yet'; with 'immer' forms the collocation 'noch immer' emphasizing continuation.
Adverb; in the collocation 'noch immer' conveys 'still' (continuative aspect).

Der Polizist sucht die Täterin noch immer.

en: I saw the perpetrator yesterday in the park.
The perpetrator was probably very nervous.
In the report, the witness describes the perpetrator.
The police officer is still looking for the perpetrator.

es: Vi a la delincuente ayer en el parque.
La delincuente probablemente estaba muy nerviosa.
En el informe, la testigo describe a la delincuente.
El policía sigue buscando a la delincuente.
fr: J'ai vu la délinquante hier au parc.
La délinquante était sans doute très nerveuse.
Dans le rapport, la témoin décrit la délinquante.
Le policier cherche encore la délinquante.
it: Ho visto la responsabile ieri al parco.
La responsabile probabilmente era molto nervosa.
Nel rapporto, la testimone descrive la responsabile.
Il poliziotto sta ancora cercando la responsabile.
zh-Hans: 我昨天在公园看见了嫌疑人。
在报告中，目击者描述了嫌疑人。
yue: 我琴日喺公園見到個疑犯。
喺報告入面，目擊者形容咗個疑犯。
個警察仲喺度搵個疑犯。
ru: Я вчера в парке видел преступницу.
pt: Eu vi a criminosa ontem no parque.
A criminosa provavelmente estava muito nervosa.
No relatório, a testemunha descreve a criminosa.
O policial ainda está procurando a criminosa.
vi: Hôm qua tôi thấy thủ phạm ở công viên.
Thủ phạm có lẽ rất căng thẳng.
Trong báo cáo, nhân chứng mô tả thủ phạm.
Cảnh sát vẫn đang tìm thủ phạm.
ar: كانت الجانية على الأرجح متوترة جدًا.
الشرطي ما זال يبحث عن الجانية.
nl: Ik heb de dader gisteren in het park gezien.
De dader was waarschijnlijk erg nerveus.
In het rapport beschrijft de getuige de dader.
De agent zoekt nog steeds naar de dader.
uk: Я вчора бачив злочинницю в парку.
hu: Tegnap láttam az elkövetőt a parkban.
Az elkövető valószínűleg nagyon ideges volt.
A jelentésben a tanú leírja az elkövetőt.
A rendőr még mindig keresi az elkövetőt.
hi: मैंने कल पार्क में अपराधी को देखा.
अपराधी शायद बहुत घबराई हुई थी.
रिपोर्ट में गवाह अपराधी का वर्णन करती है.
पुलिसकर्मी अभी भी अपराधी की तलाश में है.
el: Χτες είδα τη δράστιδα στο πάρκο.
Η δράστιδα μάλλον ήταν πολύ νευρική.
Στην έκθεση η μάρτυρας περιγράφει τη δράστιδα.
Ο αστυνομικός ψάχνει ακόμα τη δράστιδα.
nb: Jeg så gjerningskvinnen i parken i går.
id: Kemarin aku melihat pelaku di taman.
sv: Jag såg gärningskvinnan i parken i går.
ro: Am văzut făptașa ieri în parc.
În raport, martora o descrie pe făptașă.
Polițistul încă o caută pe făptașă.
cs: Včera jsem v parku viděl pachatelku.
da: Jeg så gerningskvinden i parken i går.
ja: 昨日、公園で犯人を見た。
犯人はたぶんとても緊張していた。
報告書で目撃者が犯人の特徴を説明している。
警察官はまだ犯人を探している。
